ashen_courtyard.description: A crumbling plaza of blackened stone. Ash drifts like snow. Three archways lead deeper into the ruins. A dead soldier slumps against a shattered fountain.

void_bridge.description: A narrow stone bridge spanning an endless dark chasm. The air hums with unstable Void energy. Strange runes glow faintly along the railings.

ruined_keep.description: The remains of a great fortress. The throne room ceiling has collapsed, letting in a pale sky. A Void-touched wolf prowls among the rubble.
